features.description: ChClient new methods for Mode A, ZK, ATTACH TABLE, DatabaseReplicated, mutations

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn drop_table\|pub async fn drop_database\|pub async fn detach_table_sync\|pub async fn attach_table\|pub async fn system_restore_replica\|pub async fn drop_replica_from_zkpath\|pub async fn check_zk_replica_exists\|pub async fn query_database_engine\|pub async fn execute_mutation' src/clickhouse/client.rs
layers.fail_message: Not all 9 new ChClient methods found in client.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | grep -c '^error' || echo 0
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding ChClient methods

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib -- clickhouse::client::tests::test_drop_table_sql test_drop_database_sql test_detach_table_sql test_attach_table_sql test_restore_replica_sql test_drop_replica_sql test_execute_mutation_sql 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok' || echo 0
layers.fail_message: ChClient SQL generation tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: ChClient methods require live ClickHouse for runtime testing; covered by integration tests

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib -- clickhouse::client::tests 2>&1 | grep 'test result:' | head -1
